system.description:
The Skinshifter is a partial Mage class granting shapeshifting abilities for beast forms or configurations of the user’s devising. Skinshifter Benefits. It is taken by an Adventurer with another partial class; a Partial Warrior/Skinshifter might be a savage warrior or assassin, while a Partial Expert/Skinshifter could be an impostor. All Skinshifters gain Survive-0, or Survive-1 if already trained. A Skinshifter can master one alternate form per level and revise it with a day of practice. Forms use normal hit points, attributes, and movement. A form can hold three enhancing abilities and may range from kitten to horse. Carried belongings meld into forms but retain benefits; forms cannot perfectly duplicate an individual without an appropriate ability.
